org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation

Class EllipseDecorationCreationMode

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.actionmode.ActionMode<Figure,DroidViewGraphics2D,Color>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation.AbstractAndroidCreationMode
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation.AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation.EllipseDecorationCreationMode

  • public class EllipseDecorationCreationMode
extends AbstractRectangularDecorationCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create ellipses.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel
